results.rendered_html: kilbiṣin mfn. one who commits an offence, wicked, culpable, sinful,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c. (often ifc., e.g. artha-k˚, q.v., rāja-k˚, who as a king commits an offence,  MBh. i, 1703 ).
